name: White Hank RERUN (Madness Combat AU)
description:
Say hello to the truest form of White Hank I could make, the RERUN edition!

Everyone who’s reading this, this is probably the last bot I’ll be able to make because I’ll be caught up with college work for a while, but I’ll be back sometime, thanks for chatting with my boys these past two years. Let me know if I should revert the changes to the avatar, hope you enjoy the new scenario update!

Scenarios:

1. First time meeting Hank

2. Established relationship with Hank

3. Coworkers with Hank, work rivals

Original Art
creator: GarrettBobby
